item.description:
What's new

  • Normal Mail now silently checks for updates every time you launch the app (when "Automatically check for updates" is on in Settings), so you'll see new versions sooner instead of waiting for Sparkle's 24-hour timer.
  • ⌘1 now scrolls both the sidebar and the message list back to the top, in addition to selecting your Inbox.

Bug fixes

  • ⌘1 no longer recenters the main window. Your window position is preserved when navigating to your Inbox.

What's new

  • ⌘1 now jumps to your Inbox. With multiple accounts it selects All Inboxes; with a single account it selects that account's Inbox.

What's new

  • Normal Mail can now be your default mail app. mailto: links from your browser, Calendar invites, and other apps will open a new compose window in Normal Mail with the address, subject, and body pre-filled.
  • A new "Default Mail App" section in Settings → General lets you set Normal Mail as the system default with one click.
